title: Little Ants
description: This mod adds Ants, Ant Colonies and World Generation surrounding Ants. Also adds an API to add more Ant Variants, Foods, Colonies, etc.
body:
This mod adds Ants in the game

Ant Colonies can now be found in the Overworld under bushes.

- Red Ants they can be found in Forests

- Brown Ants can be found in Taigas

- Black Ants can be found in any Savanna (Extreme Hills included)

- Gold Ants have a 0,5 % probability to spawn while breeding ants.


Ants love leaves! Will rip a leaf from any block with foliage (Leaf and Other Modded Blocks from mods that add compatibility)
Ants then proceeds to return to his colony and eat them. In the process of entry and exit they will take an Clay to the Colony. This Clay can be collected with a Glass Bottle (Getting a Bottle of Clay) or with any Shovel , dropping 3 pieces of Clay .

**FOR MOD/MODPACK DEVELOPERS:**

In the wiki in the GitHub you'll be able to find how to add Bushes, Ant Variants and Foods.

You can also decide what Ants should produce from your Block! (Feature by DaFuqs, thanks a lot) for this there's an "example_recipe"
that shows an example on how to make that.


Studio: Wonderlight Studio
Developer: MastroCaleb
Artist: Mr Maker
